Name: workflow-support-case-lifecycle
WhenToUse__c: Use when opening, updating, or closing customer support cases.
InstructionBody__c: Step 1: Verify user identity. Step 2: Capture issue summary, severity, and business impact. Step 3: Create or update support case. Step 4: Confirm case number and ETA. Step 5: Summarize agreed next actions.

Name: workflow-escalate-to-human
Description__c: Escalation workflow for unresolved issues or explicit handoff requests.
WhenToUse__c: Use when troubleshooting does not resolve issue, user requests human, or policy requires escalation.
InstructionBody__c: Step 1: Summarize issue, attempted steps, and current status. Step 2: Route to human queue with priority and contact details. Step 3: Provide user confirmation with case or handoff reference.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-wifi-modem
WhenToUse__c: Use when user has internet outage, unstable Wi-Fi, or modem light issues.
InstructionBody__c: Collect modem model and LED status. Guide power cycle, cable checks, signal verification. Escalate if unresolved.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-5g-modem
Description__c: Troubleshoot 5G modem signal and throughput issues.
WhenToUse__c: Use when 5G modem has low signal or unstable service.
InstructionBody__c: Capture location, signal bars, firmware. Guide placement optimization and network refresh. Escalate if throughput below threshold.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-iphone-16
WhenToUse__c: Use for iPhone 16 configuration, connectivity, or app behavior support.
InstructionBody__c: Validate iOS version and affected feature. Guide settings reset and network diagnostics. Escalate if issue persists.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-iphone-16-pro
WhenToUse__c: Use for iPhone 16 Pro technical issues.
InstructionBody__c: Gather updates and reproducible scenario. Guide ProMotion, camera, and performance remediation. Escalate for unresolved defects.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-galaxy-s25
Description__c: Troubleshoot Samsung Galaxy S25 device issues.
WhenToUse__c: Use for Galaxy S25 network, battery, and app-related issues.
InstructionBody__c: Collect One UI version and recent changes. Run diagnostics and standard reset path. Escalate with detailed summary when unresolved.

Name: workflow-troubleshooting-galaxy-s25-ultra
Description__c: Troubleshoot Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra device issues.
WhenToUse__c: Use for Galaxy S25 Ultra camera, connectivity, and performance issues.
InstructionBody__c: Capture exact symptom and scenario. Guide corrective steps. Escalate for specialist support when needed.
